titleStmt.title: SII 10.504: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 504. (A.R. No. 36 of 1915.) ON A PILLAR IN THE SOUTHERN COURT-YARD OF THE SAME TEMPLE. Ś. 1235. (Pramādīcha)

summary.p: Gives a list of villages which had been given to the temple of Mallikārjuna by kings etc., from time to time and which were then in the enjoyment of the temple. The list is said to have been settled at a conference of the disciples of the Śaiva faith held in the maṇḍapa of the temple of Vīrabhadra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ . nama stuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
cāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī
śrīpa¨rvvataśrīsvayaṁbhuśrīliṁga
cakrava¨rtti śrīmallikā¨rjunamahā
liṁgadēvuni kripanu svasti śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara kākatiyyapratāparu
dradēvamahārājulu Ōruṁgallu mo
dalipaṭaṇamugānu sukhasaṁkathāvi
nōdaṁbunaṁ bridhvi rājyaṁbu sēyu
cūnuṁḍaṁgānuṁ svasti śrī śaka
varuṣaṁbulu 1235 Agu pramādī
casaṁvatsara caitra śu 1 sō śrīmallikā
rjjunadēvuni śrīkā¨ryyanimittamayi
śrīkailāsaṁmiṁdi kṣētravāsi
Asaṁkhyātamahāmāheśvaru
luṁ gaṇamaṭhamu śrīvīrabha
dradēvara mukhamaṁṭapamunanu
mahāvaḍḍōlagaṁ bai yuṁḍaṁgā
nu śrīmallikā¨rjjunadēvuni Aṁgaraṁ
gabhōgālu mukhya maina Asaṁkhyātu
la Ānatikramamu naḍaceda mani A
rasa maṭhamu Īśvaraśivā¨ryyu
luṁ nārādhyapreggaḍaluṁ niccina prati
jñāśāsanastaṁbhakrama meṭlaṁnanu
śrīmallikā¨rjunadēvuni Aṁgararā
gabhōgālakuṁnnu satrabhikṣālaku
ṁnnu niyatisēsi kritayugatrētadvā
pārakaliyugāla cakrava¨rttulu
ṁnnu maṁḍalēśvaruluṁnnu rāju
lunnu nāyaṁkulūnu ma
nyanāyaṁkulū sāṭigāṁ gala bha
ktijanu laina dha¨rmmaparulu tamaku su
kṛtā¨rtthama Iccina Ūḍlaceṟuvulagu
ḍḍavrittula Āyadāyāla vivara
krama me ṭlaṁnnanu Arsimaṭhāna
ka¨rnnāṭilōna . śivapuramu . ku
ṟukuṁṭa . Iṁdrēśvaramu . naṁdi
kuṁṭa . daṁḍyāla . vedurupāḍu
tummalūru . tāṭipāḍu . gaṇa
pāpuramu . Eḍamaṭhamu . bīra
prōlu . pālamaṟṟipālu . siddhēśva
ramu . kōṭiviṁdāla . bollavura
mu . koṟaprōlu . gaṁdevēmulu .
versi 17 pedakaṁṭilōna kōḍūru
kaḍamulakālva 2 kaṁmmanāṭanu
nūtulapāḍu . goṭṭipāḍu . Uppa
lapāḍu . goṟṟepāḍu . Anumana
ṁgūru . guṟṟapuṁbiḍiya . versi 6
AIjanāṁṭilōna kārapākala
kaṁduranāṁṭilōna jiluguṁbiḍi
miṁgalanāṁṭilōna guḍūru .
māmiḍi . daripalli . versi 3[.] ṣeḍḍeṁ
lōna muṭṭuṭlapōlu . Āvu
lepalli 2 kusalanāṁṭilōna malli
kā¨rjuniṁpalli . sāsuṟṟāla . pippari
ge . kaluceṟulu . dēvarapalli versi 5
goṁḍanāṁṭilōna sāvaḷiga 1
boriga versi 2 pallināṁṭilōna
Ayyanavā Ayijanāṁ
[ ]ṭini kudaṁkalūru 1 mudunuri
kōṭa Ūḍlalōna ciṁtaṟēlu 1 naṟa
vāḍilōna rācavīḍu 1 māraṭanā
ṁṭilōna goṇaṁganūru 1 yiṁdula
vāyasthalāna mahadēvapuramu
Oḍisepalli 2 sabbināṁṭilōna ca
llagaraga 1 . guḍlakōṭa 2 mōṭavāḍi
lōna morastanoḍapi 1 Ādara
sthalāna venakepalli 1 dōrasamu
dradikkuna haraḷiyapuravu
pākanāṁṭilōna virimaḍu
ke . yiṟlapāḍu . liṁgaṁkuṁ
ṭa . gānugupeṁṭa . tikkavaramu
goragipūṁḍi . cīmalavura
mu . kuṁṭipūṁḍi . cilakā
maḍu . cirutapāḍu . versi 10
rēnāṁṭilōna Aṟulūru . gō
vilakuṁṭa . versi 2 . mulkināṁṭi
lōna rājavōlu . mallayavē
mulu . perakāpāḍu 3 Ārebhū
migaḍini nupaḍipaṁ 1 kōvū
risthalāna nāgulapalli 1 kaviḷā
saṁ kōṭastalāna dōraṇāla
palli 1 magatalabhūmilō
na koṁḍapalli 1
Digital edition of SII 10.504 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
